moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Broadcasts an all-consuming pulse — obey or be destroyed.

moves.name: Cadence Tear
moves.desc: A rhythmic attack that tears small dimensional rifts.

moves.name: Temporal Beat
moves.desc: Strikes at multiple points in time simultaneously.

moves.name: Rift Step
moves.desc: Teleports through a musical rift to flank enemies.

moves.name: Dissonant Portal
moves.desc: Opens a rift that distorts incoming attacks.

moves.name: Cadence Collapse
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: The rhythm of reality breaks, collapsing all rifts into a devastating singularity.

moves.name: Vinyl Slash
moves.desc: Spins a razor-sharp vinyl disc as a throwing weapon.

moves.name: Groove Cutter
moves.desc: A spinning attack that carves grooves into enemy armor.

moves.name: Record Scratch
moves.desc: A disorienting scratch that rewinds enemy buffs.

moves.name: Black Groove
moves.desc: Creates a dark spiral trap on the ground.

moves.name: Broken Record
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Shatters into razor-sharp vinyl fragments that lacerate everything in range.

moves.name: Building Howl
moves.desc: An attack that grows louder and stronger over 3 seconds.

moves.name: Wraith Crescendo
moves.desc: A ghostly scream that builds to ear-splitting intensity.

moves.name: Spectral Surge
moves.desc: Each consecutive attack deals 15% more damage.

moves.name: Phantom Swell
moves.desc: An invisible force that pushes enemies back with increasing pressure.

moves.name: Maximum Volume
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: The crescendo peaks — a blast of sound at 999 DB that shatters reality.

moves.name: Tyrant's Chorus
moves.desc: Forces all enemies to sing a debilitating chorus against their will.

moves.name: Commanding Voice
moves.desc: A single shouted note that pushes enemies back with physical force.

moves.name: Choir of Chains
moves.desc: Spectral choir voices bind and restrain the target.

moves.name: Oppressive Anthem
moves.desc: An anthem that reduces all enemy stats passively.

moves.name: Voice of Tyranny
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: The tyrant speaks — all enemies are silenced, stunned, and crushed beneath the weight of sound.

moves.name: Entropy Collapse
moves.desc: All tier mutations activate simultaneously — fire, stone, water, lightning, ice, sand, poison, wind, void — converging into a single annihilation wave.

moves.name: Silence Before The Drop
moves.desc: Nullifies ALL sound in the battlefield. Allies and enemies alike lose access to frequency-based abilities for 30 seconds.

moves.name: Omni-Tier Resonance
moves.desc: Channels fragments of every Sick 52 tier — Red, Emerald, Cobalt, White, Violet — amplifying all stats beyond maximum.

moves.name: Event Horizon
moves.desc: Sound rings collapse INWARD instead of outward, creating a gravitational singularity of compressed frequency that erases matter.

moves.name: The Final Drop
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: The last sound before silence. Every frequency in existence converges into a single note — then nothing. Irreversible. Total annihilation.

moves.name: Abomination Roar
moves.desc: A horrific sound that damages and terrifies.

moves.name: Twisted Harmony
moves.desc: A perversion of harmony that heals self while damaging nearby enemies.

moves.name: Mutation Pulse
moves.desc: Releases unstable energy that randomly alters enemy stats.

moves.name: Aberrant Chord
moves.desc: A chord so wrong it causes physical pain to hear.

moves.name: Harmonic Devastation
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Corrupts all harmony in range — beautiful sounds become weapons of destruction.

moves.name: Parasitic Latch
moves.desc: Attaches to an enemy's frequency, draining power continuously.

moves.name: Frequency Drain
moves.desc: Siphons raw frequency energy from the target.

moves.name: Host Corruption
moves.desc: Corrupts the target's abilities, making them backfire.

moves.name: Infestation
moves.desc: Spreads parasitic frequency to all enemies near the target.

moves.name: Total Parasitism
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Drains ALL frequency from ALL enemies simultaneously, feeding it to the Parasite.

moves.name: Dead Air Zone
moves.desc: Creates a zone of complete radio silence — no abilities work.

moves.name: Revenant's Broadcast
moves.desc: Transmits ghostly signals that haunt enemy minds.

moves.name: Signal Death
moves.desc: Kills all communication between enemies.

moves.name: Ghost Transmission
moves.desc: An untraceable attack through dead frequencies.

moves.name: Final Broadcast
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: The last broadcast ever — a signal so powerful it overwrites all other frequencies permanently.

moves.name: Sleep Song
moves.desc: A haunting lullaby that puts enemies to sleep.

moves.name: Widow's Kiss
moves.desc: A close-range attack that drains life while enemy sleeps.

moves.name: Nightmare Cradle
moves.desc: Traps a sleeping enemy in terrifying nightmares.

moves.name: Drowsy Veil
moves.desc: An aura that makes all enemies progressively sleepier.

moves.name: Eternal Lullaby
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: The final lullaby — enemies fall into a sleep from which they may never wake.

moves.name: Devour Pulse
moves.desc: Eats incoming energy pulses for HP recovery.

moves.name: Energy Consumption
moves.desc: Absorbs enemy projectiles to grow stronger.

moves.name: Hungering Field
moves.desc: An aura that slowly drains energy from all nearby enemies.

moves.name: Gluttonous Strike
moves.desc: An attack that consumes enemy buffs.

moves.name: Infinite Hunger
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Devours ALL energy in range — attacks, defenses, and life force.

moves.name: Fury Chord
moves.desc: An angry musical attack that grows stronger with rage.

moves.name: Berserker Beat
moves.desc: Enters a frenzy — attack increases 50% but defense drops.

moves.name: Wrath Crescendo
moves.desc: Builds rage over time, each attack more devastating.

moves.name: Rampage Rhythm
moves.desc: A wild rhythmic assault that hits everything nearby.

moves.name: Cantata of Annihilation
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Maximum rage — an uncontrollable explosion of pure fury energy.

moves.name: Silent Judgment
moves.desc: A soundless attack that condemns the target, marking them.

moves.name: Diocese of Quiet
moves.desc: Creates a massive silence zone where no sound exists.

moves.name: Holy Hush
moves.desc: A sacred silence that heals allies within range.

moves.name: Excommunication
moves.desc: Cuts an enemy off from frequency energy entirely.

moves.name: Cathedral of Silence
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Erects a massive silent cathedral — all sound abilities are nullified permanently.

moves.name: Holy Frequency
moves.desc: A sacred sonic blast that purifies and damages.

moves.name: Sermon of Sound
moves.desc: A sustained tone that heals allies and weakens enemies.

moves.name: Acoustic Blessing
moves.desc: Anoints an ally with sound energy, boosting all stats.

moves.name: Vicar's Judgment
moves.desc: A focused beam of righteous sonic energy.

moves.name: Divine Resonance
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Channels the voice of the divine, annihilating impurity from the battlefield.

moves.name: Multi-Head Shock
moves.desc: Three simultaneous electrical attacks from different angles.

moves.name: Hydra Growth
moves.desc: When hit, gains an additional attack per turn.

moves.name: Static Regeneration
moves.desc: Absorbs electrical damage to regenerate HP.

moves.name: Electro Swarm
moves.desc: Releases dozens of small static charges that swarm enemies.

moves.name: Hydra Storm
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Grows unlimited heads, each firing electrical blasts in all directions.

moves.name: Thunder Shock
moves.desc: A quick jolt of electricity.

moves.name: Lightning Rod
moves.desc: Absorbs an incoming energy attack to boost power.

moves.name: Static Field
moves.desc: An area that slows and damages enemies.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.desc: Swap positions with a burst of speed.

moves.name: Gigavolt Havoc
moves.desc: Ultimate: Calls down a massive lightning strike.

moves.name: Aqua Jet
moves.desc: A high-speed tackle made of water.

moves.name: Tidal Barrier
moves.desc: Summons a wall of water to block attacks.

moves.name: Drowning Pool
moves.desc: Creates a vortex that pulls in and damages foes.

moves.name: Abyssal Armor
moves.desc: Reduces damage taken and regenerates health.

moves.name: Tsunami Crash
moves.desc: Ultimate: Summons a colossal wave to crush everything.

moves.name: Poison Note
moves.desc: A vibrating tone that injects toxin on contact.

moves.name: Venomous Vibrato
moves.desc: A wavering pitch that spreads poison through the air.

moves.name: Toxic Cloud
moves.desc: Exhales a cloud of poisonous frequency.

moves.name: Corrosion Chord
moves.desc: An acid-laced musical attack that eats through armor.

moves.name: Pandemic Frequency
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Releases a frequency that turns the air itself toxic throughout the battlefield.

moves.name: Frozen Reverberation
moves.desc: An icy echo that freezes whatever it reflects off.

moves.name: Crystal Chime
moves.desc: Shatters ice crystals into razor-sharp echoing fragments.

moves.name: Permafrost Field
moves.desc: Creates a zone of permanent ice that slows and damages.

moves.name: Echo Shatter
moves.desc: A reverberating ice attack that hits the same spot multiple times.

moves.name: Glacial Resonance
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Freezes sound itself — echoes become permanent frozen structures that explode.

moves.name: Thunder Sustain
moves.desc: A sustained lightning note that channels continuously.

moves.name: Storm Wall
moves.desc: A defensive wall of swirling wind and electricity.

moves.name: Sustained Bolt
moves.desc: A single lightning bolt sustained for maximum damage over time.

moves.name: Tempest Loop
moves.desc: Creates a self-sustaining storm that persists indefinitely.

moves.name: Perpetual Storm
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Summons an unending storm — lightning, wind, and rain that never stops.

moves.name: Desert Shuffle
moves.desc: Moves through sand to reposition instantly.

moves.name: Sandstorm Beat
moves.desc: Kicks up a rhythmic sandstorm that blinds.

moves.name: Dune Shift
moves.desc: Reshapes terrain into defensive sand dunes.

moves.name: Quicksand Trap
moves.desc: Creates sinking sand beneath enemies.

moves.name: Sahara Surge
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Summons an entire desert's worth of sand in a devastating storm.

moves.name: Ember Shot
moves.desc: Launches a volley of fiery projectiles.

moves.name: Flame Wall
moves.desc: Creates a searing barrier of fire.

moves.name: Scorched Earth
moves.desc: Incinerates the ground, causing damage over time.

moves.name: Solar Flare
moves.desc: A blinding flash that stuns opponents.

moves.name: Inferno Overload
moves.desc: Ultimate: Engulfs the area in an unstoppable firestorm.

moves.name: Fog Step
moves.desc: Moves through mist to become untargetable.

moves.name: Misty Cadence
moves.desc: A rhythmic fog that heals allies and confuses enemies.

moves.name: Vapor Shroud
moves.desc: Covers the battlefield in obscuring mist.

moves.name: Condensation Strike
moves.desc: Condenses moisture into a powerful water jet attack.

moves.name: Infinite Haze
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: An impenetrable fog descends — only allies can navigate.

moves.name: Stone Fist
moves.desc: A powerful punch with the force of rock.

moves.name: Seismic Shield
moves.desc: Erects a barrier of solid earth.

moves.name: Earthquake
moves.desc: Shakes the ground violently, knocking down opponents.

moves.name: Titan's Strength
moves.desc: Massively boosts attack power for a short time.

moves.name: Gaia's Wrath
moves.desc: Ultimate: The very ground erupts to attack your foe.

moves.name: Acid Drip
moves.desc: Corrosive frequency that melts through defenses over time.

moves.name: Hallucinogenic Wave
moves.desc: Creates vivid hallucinations that confuse enemies.

moves.name: Dissolving Bass
moves.desc: A bass frequency that dissolves physical matter.

moves.name: Dream Acid
moves.desc: Traps the enemy in a hallucinatory loop.

moves.name: Psychedelic Meltdown
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Reality itself dissolves into an acid trip — enemies can't tell real from fake.

moves.name: Chaos Note
moves.desc: A discordant note that induces panic in the target.

moves.name: Fear Frequency
moves.desc: Broadcasts a frequency that triggers primal fear.

moves.name: Hysterical Crescendo
moves.desc: The panic builds — enemies flee in random directions.

moves.name: Anxiety Loop
moves.desc: Traps an enemy in escalating anxiety, reducing all stats.

moves.name: Symphony of Terror
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: A full orchestral symphony of pure dread that breaks all enemy will.

moves.name: Memory Wipe
moves.desc: Erases an enemy's memory of their last ability, resetting cooldowns.

moves.name: Static Recall
moves.desc: Replays a memory as a damaging illusion attack.

moves.name: Forgotten Frequency
moves.desc: Attacks with a frequency no one remembers — bypasses learned defenses.

moves.name: Nostalgia Trap
moves.desc: Traps enemies in paralyzing memories of the past.

moves.name: Total Amnesia
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Erases all short-term memory in range — enemies forget how to fight.

moves.name: Phantom Melody
moves.desc: Creates illusions of attacks that deal real psychological damage.

moves.name: Mirror Image
moves.desc: Summons 3 mirage clones that attack independently.

moves.name: Heat Haze
moves.desc: Distorts the air with a shimmering anthem, reducing enemy accuracy.

moves.name: False Reality
moves.desc: Replaces an enemy's perception with an illusory battlefield.

moves.name: Anthem of Illusions
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: The entire battlefield becomes a mirage — nothing anyone sees is real.

moves.name: Sorrow Wave
moves.desc: A wave of pure sadness that saps enemy motivation.

moves.name: Mourning Tone
moves.desc: A somber note that reduces enemy attack by 30%.

moves.name: Tears of Sound
moves.desc: Rains sonic tears that damage and slow.

moves.name: Melancholy Shield
moves.desc: Absorbs damage through emotional weight.

moves.name: Sonata of Despair
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: A devastating symphony of grief that crushes enemy spirit entirely.

moves.name: Silent Whisper
moves.desc: An inaudible attack that bypasses sound-based defenses.

moves.name: Choir of Whispers
moves.desc: Multiple whispered attacks from unseen sources.

moves.name: Subliminal Message
moves.desc: Implants a command beneath conscious awareness.

moves.name: Breath of Doubt
moves.desc: A whisper that makes enemies question their own abilities.

moves.name: Whispered Doom
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: A thousand whispers converge into a single word — and it breaks minds.

moves.name: Tempo Split
moves.desc: Attacks at two different tempos simultaneously.

moves.name: Dual Rhythm
moves.desc: Maintains two fighting rhythms, becoming unpredictable.

moves.name: Fractured Beat
moves.desc: Breaks time into fractured segments around the target.

moves.name: Half-Time Hammer
moves.desc: A devastating slow-motion attack with double impact.

moves.name: Temporal Schism
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Splits time itself — exists in two timelines simultaneously, attacking from both.

moves.name: Titan's Echo
moves.desc: A massive punch whose echo hits again and again.

moves.name: Reverb Dome
moves.desc: Creates a dome where all attacks echo and multiply.

moves.name: Thunderous Rebound
moves.desc: A strike that rebounds off surfaces with increasing force.

moves.name: Seismic Reverb
moves.desc: Stomps to create reverberating quakes that persist.

moves.name: Infinite Reverb
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: An attack that never stops echoing, dealing damage forever.

moves.name: Golden Hum
moves.desc: A low resonance pulse that transmits commands directly into minds.

moves.name: Grid Whisper
moves.desc: Taps into the Frequency Grid to monitor a distant location.

moves.name: Authoritarian Decree
moves.desc: Issues an unquestionable command — but only to those sworn to the Council.

moves.name: Ancient Resonance
moves.desc: A feeble defensive hum that slightly reduces incoming damage.

moves.name: Final Composition
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Attempts to freeze all sound in range. Effective only against civilians.

moves.name: Iron Baton
moves.desc: A weak strike with her conductor's baton. More symbolic than damaging.

moves.name: Public Address
moves.desc: A speech that lowers enemy morale... slightly.

moves.name: Composure
moves.desc: Maintains perfect poise under pressure, reducing status effect duration.

moves.name: Propaganda Veil
moves.desc: Creates an illusion of authority that may cause hesitation.

moves.name: Execution Order
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Summons Harmonic Guards to fight on her behalf. She does not fight directly.

moves.name: Orchestral Wave
moves.desc: A weak shockwave from his ornamental staff. Mostly ceremonial.

moves.name: Formation Command
moves.desc: Directs nearby guards into defensive formation.

moves.name: Golden Guard
moves.desc: Raises his staff to create a brief protective barrier.

moves.name: Enforcement Strike
moves.desc: A disciplined strike aimed at civilians. Ineffective against trained fighters.

moves.name: Harmonic Suppression
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Activates the local Grid node to dampen all sound. Only works near Grid infrastructure.

moves.name: Legal Binding
moves.desc: Wraps the target in bureaucratic red tape. Slows movement by 10%.

moves.name: Gavel Strike
moves.desc: A feeble tap with his tuning-fork gavel. Almost zero damage.

moves.name: Objection
moves.desc: Interrupts an enemy's attack with a shout. May cause flinch.

moves.name: Sound Law Citation
moves.desc: Recites regulations so boring they cause minor psychic damage.

moves.name: Summary Judgment
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Declares the opponent guilty. Has no actual combat effect.

moves.name: Shock Baton
moves.desc: A weak electrical prod designed for unarmed prisoners.

moves.name: Lockdown
moves.desc: Seals exits in an enclosed space. Useless in open combat.

moves.name: Silence Chamber
moves.desc: Attempts to create a small zone of silence. Easily broken.

moves.name: Intimidation
moves.desc: Glares menacingly. May lower attack of cowardly opponents.

moves.name: Solitary Confinement
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Traps a weakened target in a temporary sound-null bubble. Breaks immediately against strong foes.

moves.name: Charming Address
moves.desc: A soothing speech that may confuse a weak-willed target.

moves.name: Propaganda Wave
moves.desc: Broadcasts Council messaging that clouds judgment temporarily.

moves.name: Smiling Deflection
moves.desc: Dodges a question — and occasionally an attack — with a perfect smile.

moves.name: Cultural Override
moves.desc: Rewrites a target's musical preferences. Only works on civilians.

moves.name: Harmony is Freedom
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: A mass-suggestion broadcast. Devastating to civilians, meaningless to trained fighters.

moves.name: Frequency Scan
moves.desc: Identifies a target's sound signature. No damage dealt.

moves.name: Compliance Check
moves.desc: Flags a target as "non-compliant." Alerts nearby guards.

moves.name: Data Log
moves.desc: Records everything. Has no combat use whatsoever.

moves.name: Surveillance Ping
moves.desc: A weak sonar pulse that reveals hidden targets in a small area.

moves.name: Total Monitoring
moves.desc: ULTIMATE: Activates the FCB surveillance network. Useful for intelligence, useless in battle.
